issues.description: DSL is missing the primary effect: 'All of your Characters gain +1 cost'. The current DSL only captures the conditional power boost and completely omits the cost increase.
Condition is incomplete. Should check 'if you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more', not just 'HasCardOnBoard Character'. Needs to verify cost threshold.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (activated when leader enters play), not 'Activated' (player-activated ability). This is a passive leader effect.
